essence: Creates durable, precise, and visually clean surfaces using tiles, adhesives, and skilled craftsmanship.

identity.title: Tiler
identity.summary: Installs wall and floor tiles in homes and commercial spaces, ensuring accurate layout, clean cuts, strong adhesion, and high‑quality finishes.

salary.notes: Specialists in large‑format tiles, wet rooms, or high‑end commercial work can exceed £50k-£60k+.

qualifications: Apprenticeship or Level 2/3 Diploma in Wall and Floor Tiling
Knowledge of adhesives, grouts, and substrates

lifestyle.description: Tilers work on residential and commercial projects installing tiles on floors, walls, bathrooms, kitchens, and wet rooms. Days involve preparing surfaces, marking layouts, cutting tiles, applying adhesives, grouting, and ensuring clean, symmetrical finishes. The role requires precision, patience, and strong practical skill. This lifestyle suits individuals who enjoy craftsmanship, visual detail, and transforming spaces through clean, high‑quality finishes.
